sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: ADP는 2025년 9월 30일 분기 매출 51억 7,520만 달러를 기록하며 HCM 기술 및 아웃소싱 서비스의 견조한 성장세를 유지했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 매출은 전년 동기 대비 7% 성장한 51억 7,520만 달러를 기록했으며, 유기적 고정 환율 기준으로는 6% 성장했습니다.
희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 2.49달러로 전년 대비 6% 증가했으며, 조정 희석 EPS는 7% 성장했습니다.
주주 환원 정책으로 총 1.0B 달러를 집행했으며, 이 중 0.6B 달러는 배당금, 0.4B 달러는 자사주 매입에 사용되었습니다.

riskChanges.text: 역동적인 비즈니스 및 규제 환경 변화에 대응해야 하는 HCM 솔루션의 특성상 지속적인 운영 리스크가 존재합니다.
미래 예측 진술은 경영진의 가정과 기대에 의존하며, 실제 결과는 다양한 불확실성과 리스크 요인에 의해 달라질 수 있습니다.

businessChanges.text: ADP Embedded Payroll의 소상공인 고객 확대, Workforce Now Next-Gen의 중견 기업 배포 가속화, ADP Lyric HCM의 엔터프라이즈 판매 모멘텀이 성장을 견인했습니다.
미국 내 고용 지표인 'pays per control'은 안정세를 유지했으며, PEO 평균 근로자 수는 전년 대비 2% 증가했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 분기 매출 51억 7,520만 달러와 순이익 10억 1,300만 달러를 달성하며 안정적인 수익성을 입증했습니다.
총자산 543억 2,080만 달러를 보유하고 있으며, 현금 및 현금성 자산은 24억 7,800만 달러로 견고한 재무 상태를 유지 중입니다.

watchItems.text: 낮은 자본 집약적 모델을 통한 강력한 현금 흐름 창출 능력이 확인되나, 향후 글로벌 시장 확장과 AI 기술 도입이 수익성 개선에 미칠 영향력을 지속 관찰해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2025-09-30 revenue = 51억 7,520만 달러 (USD 5.175B; 5,175 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 net income = 10억 1,300만 달러 (USD 1.013B; 1,013 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 total assets = 543억 2,080만 달러 (USD 54.321B; 54,321 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 cash and cash equivalents = 24억 7,800만 달러 (USD 2.478B; 2,478 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-30.

financial measures to their nearest comparable GAAP financial measures. 25 EXECUTIVE OVERVIEW As a global leader in HR and payroll solutions, ADP continuously aims to solve complex business challenges for our clients and their workers. Our Human Capital Management ("HCM") solutions, which include both software and outsourcing services, are designed to help our clients manage their workforce through a dynamic business and regulatory landscape and the changing world of work. We see tremendous opportunity ahead as we focus on our three key Strategic Priorities: Leading with Best-in-Class HCM technology, Providing Unmatched Expertise and Outsourcing Solutions, and Leveraging our Global Scale for the Benefit of our Clients. During the first quarter, we made meaningful progress on our Strategic Priorities. We continued to scale ADP Embedded Payroll to reach additional small business clients, a

ccelerated the deployment of Workforce Now Next-Gen to a growing percentage of new mid-market clients, and experienced ongoing strong enterprise sales momentum for ADP Lyric HCM. We continued to empower our associates to leverage their HR domain expertise by providing them with AI tools that further enhanced the client and associate experience. Finally, we continued to build on our global scale by enhancing the services offered within our existing footprint of more than 140 countries and territories. Highlights from the three months ended September 30, 2025 include: • Revenue growth of 7% to $5,175.2 million; 6% growth on an organic constant currency • Diluted and adjusted diluted earnings per share ("EPS") growth of 6% and 7%, respectively, to $2.49 • Cash returned via shareholder friendly actions of $1.0B, includ  Normalized numeric aliases: $5,175.2 million = 51억 7,520만 달러; $5,175.2 = 5,175.2달러; $2.49 = 2.49달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러; $0.6 = 0.6달러; $0.4 = 0.4달러; 5,175 million = 51억 7,500만 달러.

ended September 30, 2025, we delivered strong revenue growth of 7%, 6% growth on an organic constant currency basis. Our pays per control metric, which represents the number of employees on ADP clients' payrolls in the United States when measured on a same-store-sales basis for a subset of clients ranging from small to large businesses, remained stable for the three months ended September 30, 2025 as compared to the three months ended September 30, 2024. PEO average worksite employees increased 2% for the three months ended September 30, 2025, as compared to the three months ended September 30, 2024. We have a strong business model, generating significant cash flows with low capital intensity, and offer a suite of products that provide critical support to our clients’ HCM functions. We generate sufficient free cash flow to satisfy our cash dividend and our modest debt obligations, which
